items.arabicText: ((ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).

translations.en: (The thirst has gone and the veins are quenched, and reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.)

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي)).

translations.en: (O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which envelopes all things, that You forgive me.)
